title: Skopeo Docker Image
body:
For Google Cloud Build, I want Skopeo to run as a step. Therefor I need optimally it prepacked into a Docker Image.
Is there any official Docker Image? My Google Foo seems weak.

comments.body:
Found it by accident: quay.io/skopeo/stable
Seems like quay is not liked by Google.
Thanks for reaching out! We recently wrote a blog on that image: https://www.redhat.com/sysadmin/how-run-skopeo-container
